title: Small horse stable
description: Adds a small horse stable to plains and forest biomes
body:
This simple Minecraft mod adds a new, small horse stable structure to the game, inside the stable, you'll find two horses and a chest containing everything you need to saddle your first horse, along with some treats for the horse as well.

If you look closely, you might discover a hidden chest at the stable.

The structure spawns in normal plains and forest biomes.

![Horse stable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a81468fd003bf900d8da6e0fa0fb968d2a40cee.jpeg)
Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
